name: @bpmn-os/bpmnos-wasm
description: WebAssembly build of the BPMN-OS execution engine with an interactive JavaScript interface.

scripts.build: emcmake cmake -S . -B build-wasm && cmake --build build-wasm --target bpmnos_module
scripts.test:wasm: node test/wasm/drive_test.mjs && node test/wasm/message_test.mjs && node test/wasm/greedy_test.mjs && node test/wasm/observe_test.mjs
